A [[Color/Legends|golden]]-furred '''unidentified Bothan''' was a [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protector.]] The [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] served with [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] at [[Caluula Station]] in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]].
